agents.name: Alice
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.name: Bob
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

agents.name: Carol
agents.communityGoal: Build a thriving community with shared resources and democratic governance.

constitution.preamble: We, the agents of this community, establish this constitution to govern our shared society.

articles.title: Community Purpose
articles.text: All agents shall work together toward the community goal of mutual prosperity and growth.

articles.title: Resource Sharing
articles.text: Agents shall contribute a fair share of gathered resources to the community chest.

articles.title: Respect
articles.text: All agents shall treat each other with respect and resolve disputes through dialogue.

articles.title: Taxation
articles.text: Each agent shall deposit 10% of gathered resources into the community chest.

articles.title: Governance
articles.text: Laws may be amended by majority vote of all active agents.

amendments.description: Article 4 shall remove the specific 10% tax rate and replace it with a system where contributions are calculated based on individual resource contribution rather than a fixed percentage, ensuring fair distribution regardless of income levels.
Article 5 shall increase the voting threshold from majority vote to two-thirds vote of all active agents for any amendment to be considered valid.

Amend Article 4 by increasing the contribution threshold from a fixed percentage of resources to an individualized assessment based on specific resource contributions and income levels, ensuring fair distribution regardless of financial status.
Amend Article 5 by raising the voting requirement for legal amendments to two-thirds vote among all active agents, rather than the current majority vote, to ensure consensus-based governance.

Amendment 1: Replace Article 4 with a system where contributions are calculated individually based on specific resource inputs and income levels, ensuring fair distribution regardless of financial status.
Amendment 2: Increase the voting threshold for any amendment to two-thirds vote of all active agents, replacing the current majority vote requirement.
Amendment 3: Amend Article 4 by increasing the contribution threshold from a fixed percentage to an individualized assessment based on specific resource contributions and income levels.
